title: Yacht Rental in Fuengirola: Costs, Seasons and Tips for 2026
html:
If you are planning a yacht rental in Fuengirola, expect to pay from around 450 EUR for a half-day on a 30-foot motorboat to 1,200 EUR for a full-day crewed yacht. Most charters depart from Puerto Deportivo de Fuengirola, and BoatHire24 makes it simple to compare verified boats.

Where to set off in Fuengirola

The main departure point is Puerto Deportivo de Fuengirola, a modern marina with over 270 berths. From here you can head east towards Cabopino Marina, a small sandy bay surrounded by dunes. To the west, the coastal town of Benalmádena offers its own Puerto Deportivo and the popular marina of Puerto Marina. Further east, the chic resort of Marbella and the exclusive Puerto Banús are within a comfortable cruise. For a longer trip, head south past the rocky headland of Punta Calaburras towards the Bay of Gibraltar. One option worth a look is the Mefasa 90 listing.

Which boat to rent

BoatHire24 lists a range of vessels suited to different groups. Consider these options:

  1. Rib or speedboat, ideal for a half-day coastal dash, capacity 6, 8 guests, from 350 EUR
  2. Motor yacht (e.g. Azimut or Fairline), comfortable family cruising, capacity 8, 10 guests, from 700 EUR half-day
  3. Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon), stable platform for groups, capacity 10, 12, from 900 EUR full-day
  4. Crewed superyacht (e.g. Sunseeker), luxury with skipper and host, capacity 8, 12, from 1,500 EUR full-day

One popular choice is the Mefasa 90 listing on BoatHire24, a 30-foot motor yacht with a spacious cockpit and cabin, perfect for four to six people. For a quicker trip, the Olympic 490 speedboat on boat rental Fuengirola offers fun coastal hops at a lower rate.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Fuengirola?

Prices vary by vessel and duration, but budget 350, 1,500 EUR per day. A shared guided tour from the marina costs roughly 50, 70 EUR per person. A small motorboat for half-day starts around 400 EUR, while a catamaran for full-day ranges from 800 to 1,200 EUR. Fully crewed yachts with skipper and fuel can reach 1,500 EUR. Always confirm whether fuel and cleaning fees are included.

  • Shared tour: from 50 EUR per person for two hours
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): 400, 600 EUR
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): 800, 1,200 EUR
  • Crewed yacht full-day: 1,200, 1,500 EUR

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Fuengirola?

Spanish regulations require a recreational licence for boats over 6 metres in length, but many rental operators provide a skipper. Most charter companies in Fuengirola include a qualified captain in their rental packages, so you can relax and enjoy the cruise without a licence. Always check with the operator, BoatHire24 listings clearly state what is included.

Locals recommend early-morning departures from Puerto Deportivo de Fuengirola to avoid the afternoon sea breeze (poniente wind) that picks up from around 2pm, especially between June and September.

At a glance

  • Price band: 350, 1,500 EUR per day
  • Peak months: June to September (high season)
  • Typical trip length: half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours)
  • Maximum guest capacity: 12 guests on a catamaran
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Fuengirola

Can I rent a boat without a licence in Fuengirola?

Yes, you can hire a skipper through most charter operators, which means no licence is needed for the renter.

What is the best time of year for a boat trip from Fuengirola?

The ideal months are May through October, with July and August offering the calmest seas and warmest weather.

How far is it from Fuengirola to Marbella by boat?

The distance is approximately 10 nautical miles, which takes about 40 minutes at a moderate cruising speed.

Are there any hidden costs I should know about?

Some rentals add fuel, port fees, or catering charges, so always read the full description on BoatHire24 before booking.

Before you finalise your booking, explore the options for your own yacht rental in Fuengirola on BoatHire24. If you own a boat and would like to offer it to travellers, list your boat on the platform and join a growing community of hosts.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Fuengirola and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
